content.speakerText: Do you have any plans for Easter?
expectedAnswers: Not really, just a quiet day with my dog.
I'm going to my parents' for brunch — and chocolate eggs, of course!
Still working on it — maybe a weekend getaway.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应复活节安排，是否体现文化背景（如巧克力蛋）
语言准确性：使用了自然的口语结构（如 'just a quiet day', 'maybe a getaway'）
表达自然度：语气轻松，符合朋友间闲聊氛围
关键词覆盖：使用了 'plans', 'brunch', 'chocolate eggs', 'getaway', 'quiet day' 等节日相关词汇

content.scenarioHint: 你和同事在茶水间闲聊，想自然询问对方即将到来的周末计划
content.speakerText: Any fun plans for the weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 周末有什么有趣的计划吗？
expectedAnswers: Not much, just gonna catch up on sleep and watch a movie.
I'm hiking with some friends—hope the weather holds!
Still deciding, maybe visit my sister in the city.
Probably just chill at home with takeout 😄
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了对方的假期/周末计划
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、符合英语母语者习惯的表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 weekend / plans / fun 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你和邻居在小区散步时，想礼貌询问对方即将到来的暑假安排
content.speakerText: Do you have any travel plans for the summer?
expectedAnswers: We're thinking of renting a cabin by the lake—finally some quiet time!
Not yet, but we're considering a road trip up the coast.
Probably stay local—kids have summer camp, so no big trips.
Going back home to visit family abroad—can't wait!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确询问了对方的暑假安排
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确（如将来时、进行时）
表达自然度：是否使用了符合日常对话的口语表达和语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含 summer / travel / plans 等场景关键词
